headline: FAF Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates on Commercial Strength
summary: First American tops Q1 earnings estimates as Title segment strength and higher premiums drive revenue growth, offset partly by rising expenses.

headline: DOJ-Fed probe set a dangerous precedent, says former Fed Governor Mishkin
summary: Frederic Mishkin, former Federal Reserve governor, joins 'Closing Bell' to discuss the Federal Reserve, the upcoming Fed meeting and much more.
